targetSku: 家庭云电脑畅享版月包
hypothesisUnderTest: After each CAG HTTPS desktop refresh, replay one round of captured visible HTTP timer packets: heartbeat, infoReport, and logReport config.
importantFinding: CAG after-status checks can miss an off interval because the next CAG round can pull the desktop back to running. Verification must check power state before each CAG attempt and/or run an independent monitor.
codeChangeFromFinding: cag-verify now checks cloud power state before each CAG attempt and fails with power_state_not_running_before_cag instead of letting CAG mask a shutdown.
